coupon.source_phrase_block: One Franklin Park Road, Boston, MA, 02121 Map 617-541-5466 Each pass admits up to 6 people to either the Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or the Stone Zoo (Stoneham) at a discounted rate of $9 per adult and $6 per child.
